text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Four minutes, twenty-five seconds until
commencing today's mission—"assist Flower in
constructing a new special for the cafeteria."

text_block_list.name: Dormmates
text_block_list.text:
It's Miho Dorm vs Ritto Dorm! Time to find out
whose menu will become the cafeteria's next
special!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Today, the dorms are battlin' to see who can
create the best set menu! The winner's set will be
featured as a limited special at the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While the dorm leaders and trainers will be the
judges, competitors will also appraise the
opposing team's submission.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Representing Miho Dormitory is Rice Shower and
her sous-chef, Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not sure if I can do this, but I'll do my best!
Let's do this, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You don't have a thing to worry about with
me—the class representative—here by your side!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And representing Ritto Dormitory is Nishino
Flower and her sous-chef, Mihono Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best together!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Commencing mission to produce a
new cafeteria special.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... So, what do you think we should start with?
Oh, the main course is supposed to be a meat
dish, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, sauteed pork. A sample has been provided
for us, so let us test it now.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Garlic and pepper detected. I suspect this is a type of barbecue sauce, but its spiciness level is above average.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Among today's taste testers is Rice Shower, who
dislikes spicy foods. I suggest that we create a
different sauce.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
How about we make a sweet sauce, then? Go
ahead and choose one that you like!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching for "sweet sauces." Results
found—teriyaki sauce, Madeira sauce, chocolate
sauce...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate would make it a dessert! Oh! How
about orange sauce?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is a classic in French cuisine. I agree with
your proposal.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I got inspired by the outfit you're wearing! Hehe,
see, you have a little orange slice in your hair.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see. Speaking of which, you were the one who
suggested this design for me when I was deciding
what to wear.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I did! And I'm so glad you went with it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Wearing this outfit reminds me of the dessert
contest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps because that too required teamwork in
the kitchen. When I cook in this outfit, it makes
me think about how others will receive our food.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It compels me to try tweaking and improving a
recipe, rather than simply following it exactly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That is why I thought it appropriate to wear this
for today's competition.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you put so much thought into this... Hehe.
Let's get to work on making something really
tasty!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. In fact, I already have another idea.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
What do you think of including a choice of side
dishes for individuals like Bakushin O, who place
great importance on nutritionally balanced
meals?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's a great idea! Okay, for side dishes, we
can do a salad, a stewed dish, some pickled
goodies...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Aaand stop! Time for some taste testin'! Let's
start with what Miho Dorm made!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... So... We decided to go with a nutritionally
balanced main dish and chocolate cake as an
extra treat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This sweet treat is our way of applauding
everyone for their daily efforts!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Also, Bourbon's outfit looks like a chocolate cake
so, um, I thought it might be one of her favorite
foods...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So... yeah! That's why we chose to add a slice of
chocolate cake!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You considered what I might like and included it
as a special treat?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They must have been thinking of us while putting
together their meal too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The results are in! The judges say... Miho and
Ritto Dorm are tied winners! Both set menus will
be sent to the cafeteria's chef!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Since both teams paid such careful attention to
their opponents' preferences, we found both sets
worthy of being served at the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
W-we did it! Ehehe! Isn't that great news,
Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I am looking forward to eating today's meal
again in the future.
